title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Narayana Health Digital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Narayana Health Digital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health Digital invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
